arts.ttl: Serie A leader Napoli beats Lecce amid flares and delays to go 6 points clear of Inter
arts.sum: Giacomo Raspadori scored the only goal to send Napoli six points clear of second-placed Inter Milan, which was playing lowly Hellas Verona later. Lecce reacted well and Kialonda Gaspar headed a corner onto the crossbar but, despite laying siege to the goal, it couldn’t find the equalizer and remained just a point above the relegation zone.

arts.ttl: Player Ratings: Lecce 0-1 Napoli – Raspadori Conquers Puglia
arts.sum: Napoli snatched a gutsy 1-0 win against relegation-battling Lecce to temporarily steer six points clear of Inter at the top of the Serie A standings. It was not a convincing display from Antonio Conte's side, but it was enough to bring them a step closer to their second title in three years. The post Player Ratings: Lecce 0-1 Napoli – Raspadori Conquers Puglia appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
